body:
This PR adds support for downloading and ingesting datasets from the [Copernicus Marine Data Store](https://data.marine.copernicus.eu/products). These include GLORYS12 as well as the CMEMs analysis / forecast (there are other datasets as well).

Full support requires an extension based on PythonCall and CondaPkg to install the command line interface `copernicusmarine`. There is also a need for users to get an account with Copernicus and set environment variables.

Note, it is possible to avoid the dep on PythonCall and invoke `copernicusmarine` directly from the command line using `run`. After some thought, I decided to use the Python interface because it is a bit nicer for users; for example this allows us to access the python docstrings. We can consider splitting up the ext into a python and conda separate ext in the future though.

Closes #488

labels.description: We must feed the models so they don't get cranky
labels.name: data wrangling

title: Add support for Metadata of Copernicus datasets
